title: pelargonium × signatum
intro: Pelargonium × signatum, also known as the rose-scented geranium, is a species of flowering plant within the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects due to the presence of geraniol and linalool compounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium × signatum include relief from menstrual cramps, anxiety, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a natural insect repellent. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, tea, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
